messages.content: "Joseph, you're free to go back to doing what you were doing previously, while we deal with DW. So you're not going to be grounded." paraphrase
"Joseph, you may resume your prior activities as we take care of DW. You are no longer restricted."
“Joseph, you’re free to go back to doing what you were doing previously, while we punish DW. So you’re not going to be grounded.” paraphrase
"Joseph, you can continue with what you were doing before, as we handle disciplining DW. You won't face any grounding."
“Joseph, you’re free to go back to doing what you were doing previously, while we punish DW. So you’re not going to be grounded.” paraphrase fluently
"Joseph, feel free to return to your prior activities while we address DW's punishment. There will be no grounding for you."
“Joseph, you’re free to go back to doing what you were doing previously, while we punish DW. So you’re not going to be grounded.” paraphrase formally
"Joseph, you are at liberty to resume your former pursuits as we administer punishment to DW. Consequently, you will not be subjected to any confinement."
“Joseph, you’re free to go back to doing what you were doing previously, while we punish DW. So you’re not going to be grounded.” paraphrase expandedly

"Joseph, you have the freedom to return to the activities you were engaged in before this incident, as we take responsibility for meting out the appropriate punishment to DW. As a result, you won't be facing any restrictions or grounding at this time."
“Joseph, you’re free to go back to doing what you were doing previously, while we set up a punishment day for DW. You’re no longer grounded, still.” paraphrase
"Joseph, you may continue with your earlier activities while we organize a disciplinary day for DW. Your grounding has been lifted and remains so."
“Joseph, you’re free to go back to doing what you were doing previously, while we set up a punishment day for DW. You’re no longer grounded, still.” paraphrase formally
"Joseph, you are at liberty to resume your previous engagements while we arrange a day of discipline for DW. Be assured, your grounding has been revoked and remains so."

“Sorry Joseph, we thought you were the one who did this with DW. Joseph, you’re free to go back to doing what you were doing previously, while we set up a punishment day for DW. You’re no longer grounded, still.” paraphrase

"Apologies, Joseph, as we mistakenly believed you were involved in the incident with DW. You are now cleared to return to your prior activities while we arrange a punishment day for DW. Rest assured, your grounding has been lifted and remains so.”

“Sorry Joseph, we thought you were the one who did all this. But no. DW did all this. Joseph, you’re free to go back to doing what you were doing previously, while we set up a punishment day for DW. You’re no longer grounded, still.” paraphrase

"Our apologies, Joseph; it seems we were incorrect in assuming you were responsible for these actions. It was, in fact, DW. With that clarified, Joseph, you are allowed to resume your previous activities as we prepare a day of punishment for DW. And to reiterate, you are no longer under any restrictions or grounding."

“Sorry Joseph, we thought you were the one who did all this. But no. DW did all this. Joseph, you’re free to go back to doing what you were doing previously, while we set up a punishment day for DW. You’re no longer grounded, still.” paraphrase formally

"Our apologies, Joseph, for the misunderstanding; we were under the impression that you were the culprit. However, it turns out DW is responsible. Therefore, Joseph, you may proceed with your original engagements while we organize a day of reprimand for DW. Please be reminded that your grounding has been rescinded and remains so."
